content.situation: 旅客在海外旅行时不小心摔伤，想了解如何开始理赔流程
content.speakerText: I fell and hurt my leg while hiking. What should I do first to start the claim?
content.speakerTextCn: 我在徒步时摔倒伤了腿，要开始理赔，第一步该做什么？
content.responseTemplate: I should ___ first, then keep all medical documents.

options: send an email to the office

content.hint: 第一步通常是联系官方提供的紧急援助渠道
content.knowledgePoint: 理赔流程的初始步骤：及时联系官方支持

content.situation: 旅客在外国药店买了药，不确定是否需要保留收据才能理赔
content.speakerText: I bought medicine at a local pharmacy. Do I need to keep the receipt for the claim?
content.speakerTextCn: 我在当地药房买了药，理赔时需要保留收据吗？
content.responseTemplate: Yes, you must ___ — they're required for processing.

options: take a photo of the pharmacy
ask the pharmacist for a letter

content.hint: 所有医疗相关凭证都必须保留，这是理赔的基本要求
content.knowledgePoint: 理赔所需凭证：保留收据或单据

content.situation: 旅客担心理赔流程复杂，想确认是否需要亲自提交材料
content.speakerText: Do I have to go to an office to submit my claim documents?
content.speakerTextCn: 我必须亲自去办公室提交理赔材料吗？
content.responseTemplate: No, you can usually ___ — no in-person visit needed.

blanks.answer: submit them online or by email
options: submit them online or by email
mail them to a government office
hand them to your tour guide
wait for them to contact you

content.hint: 现代理赔大多支持远程提交，无需亲自到场
content.knowledgePoint: 理赔材料提交方式：远程提交的常用表达
